findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 36. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Handwritten initials/signatures next to the FROM field names are missing from the HTML text content.
findings.evidence: PDF FROM field shows handwritten initials (appearing as 'KH' and 'bw') next to 'Karen Higgins, Wetlands, Buffers and Stormwater Compliance and Permitting Unit' and 'Brian Wrenn, Transportation Permitting Unit'. The HTML FROM field renders these names as plain text with no signature or initial marks.

findings.description: Handwritten signatures/initials next to the FROM names (Karen Higgins and Brian Wrenn) are not captured in the HTML. The PDF shows handwritten authentication marks after each name.
findings.evidence: PDF FROM line shows handwritten initials/signatures after 'Karen Higgins, Wetlands, Buffers and Stormwater Compliance and Permitting Unit' and 'Brian Wrenn, Transportation Permitting Unit'. HTML renders only the typed text with no tags for these marks.

findings.description: The 'One NorthCarolina Naturally' branding logo in the PDF footer is rendered as plain text in the HTML rather than being preserved as an image.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 1 footer contains a stylized branding logo 'NorthCarolina Naturally'. HTML footer renders this as plain text: '

One North Carolina Naturally

' with no corresponding tag.
